case_title: VIKRAM KASHYAP VS. EASTERN CLASSICS LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KASHYAP, VIKRAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EASTERN CLASSICS LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KASHYAP, VIKRAM AS TO DEFENDANT EASTERN CLASSICS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-10-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EASTERN CLASSICS LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KASHYAP, VIKRAM AS TO DEFENDANT EASTERN CLASSICS LLC
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KASHYAP, VIKRAM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EASTERN CLASSICS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF VIKRAM KASHYAP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EASTERN CLASSICS LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JAY YIN, MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
